title: MelodyMagic
description: All the melodies in nature can give you inspiration, what do you think you can do with them ......
body:
All the melodies in nature can give you inspiration, what do you think you can do with them ......
You can record the sounds you hear, and afterwards, use the staff to unleash the power in those melodies!

We recommend playing with Pachauri's manual to get a beginner's guide.
This is a beta version, full content will be available after teacon 2024!
